message:
fix(evidence): improve EvidenceTimeline controlled mode and UX

Fixes from second code review:

1. Fixed isControlled logic - now only checks `selectedId !== undefined`
   Previously checking `onSelectEntry !== undefined` caused inconsistent
   behavior where selection worked but close button didn't

2. Added keys to AnimatePresence children for proper exit animations
   - Desktop: key={`desktop-${selectedEntry.id}`}
   - Mobile: key={`mobile-${selectedEntry.id}`}

3. Added backdrop click handler to mobile overlay
   Users can now dismiss the detail panel by clicking outside it

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
